summary:
PROPHETIC VISION AND WARNING: Brandon shares a heavy message revealed to him by the Holy Spirit during prayer time, positioning himself as a watchman whose duty is to alert others about impending events. Brandon emphasizes that his intention is not to provoke fear, but rather to communicate these visions so that they can be mitigated or prevented through dedicated intercessory prayer.

THE RIVER BARGE AND ROCKET LAUNCH: Brandon describes a vision of a massive, weathered barge marked with rust, featuring a white captain's cabin and a black upper section, traveling down the Mississippi River supposedly carrying grain. The vessel navigates into the Gulf of Mexico and turns east, at which point an Asian crew opens a deck hatch to raise a specific projectile. Brandon observes that the rocket is black and white, measures about five feet tall and up to two feet thick, and bears the inscription USSR before being fired directly over the United States.

EMP DETONATION AND GEOGRAPHIC IMPACT: Brandon explains that the rocket explodes over an area encompassing Tennessee, Kentucky, Atlanta, Mississippi, Alabama, and Ohio, triggering a destructive electromagnetic pulse that causes complete darkness and devastation across the eastern region, particularly affecting Virginia and Pennsylvania. However, Brandon hears a voice in the spiritual realm stating that the weapon will not reach a high enough altitude, which prevents its blast radius from fully devastating the western parts of the country.

PARTIAL GRID FAILURE IN THE WEST: Brandon notes that the further west the impact spreads, the less severe the consequences become, using Colorado as a specific example. In these western areas, residents lose modern communication systems like cell phones, the internet, and cable television, but they manage to retain access to landline telephones and older televisions equipped with antennas. Brandon observes that while the power grid is significantly weakened, prohibiting the use of multiple appliances simultaneously, basic electricity remains functional.

PERSONAL EXPERIENCE AND EMERGENCY RESPONSE: Brandon recounts witnessing the activation of emergency broadcast systems, which automatically turn on televisions to warn citizens about the unfolding catastrophe. During this vision, Brandon receives a phone call on his landline from friends inquiring about the situation, and Brandon confirms that his home still has electricity by checking his refrigerator and seeing the interior light still shining.

ENVIRONMENTAL CLUES AND SEASONAL TIMELINE: Brandon actively examines the surrounding environment within the spiritual vision to determine when this event might occur, paying close attention to the weather, the trees, and the sun's position. By noticing the warm temperature, the presence of leaves on the sycamore trees, and the sun setting toward the southwest, Brandon deduces that this impending EMP attack is scheduled to take place during a late summer month.
rawData: [July 13, 2023]-[The Lord showed me an EMP attack on America when I was praying]-[https://youtu.be/tWg3r_VvMGQ]-[Hey, good morning everybody. I just wanted to come on here and tell you some more things the Lord has showed me in prayer time. I'll tell you some positive things, some good things, but I have to tell you this first, and this is not so good. I want to be uplifting. I don't want to stir up fear or make anybody afraid, but I have to tell you what the Holy Spirit is telling me. There are things that we can avoid and some things I don't think we can. I feel I'm a watchman, like I've said, and it's my job to tell you what's going on. There was a massive barge traveling down the Mississippi River. I could see rust on the side of this barge; it was like a big boat. It was supposedly carrying grain or something out of the north somewhere. There was black all around the top of it. The area where the captain or the person who drives the boat sits was white and had rust on it. It looked like it was weathered. There was a little square opening on the deck part. They were moving, went out into the Gulf of Mexico, and turned their boat to face east. They opened the hatch and put out a rocket. They lifted it up. The men on this boat were Asian; I have no idea if it was China or whatever, but they raised this rocket up. It was about five feet tall and probably about a foot to two feet thick at the most. It was black and white and had USSR written on the rocket. They shot the rocket out over America, and when they did, it exploded. But I kept hearing in the spirit realm, 'It's not going to get high enough.' That's what I was hearing. It went out over the Tennessee and Kentucky area, Atlanta, Mississippi, Alabama, and then it went up by Ohio and exploded right over all that area. When it did, it was an EMP, and the EMP turned out all the lights. Because it didn't get high enough, it didn't have a blast radius that affected everything way over to the west, but it affected all of Virginia and Pennsylvania. It was terrible; complete darkness was over this area. The further west you went, it wasn't as dark, and things weren't affected as badly. I could see that people in places like Colorado did not have cell phones, internet, or cable TV. They had TVs with bunny ears and landline telephones, and they still had electricity. You weren't able to have a whole bunch of stuff going; the power grid was really weak, but you were still able to power things. I don't understand it all; I just see things whenever I'm praying. I could see the emergency broadcast come on. I could hear it, and they were warning the people of what happened. You know how they warn you with the emergency broadcast alerts on our TVs? They ran that because it turned the TV on, and you could hear the emergency broadcast going off. I had some friends call the landline at my house, and they asked, 'Do you have power?' I said, 'Yes.' I went to my refrigerator, opened it up, and there was still a light on inside. Looking out south, I could see in the spirit realm that the sycamore trees had leaves on them. It was still really warm outside. Whenever I'm seeing in the spirit and the Lord is showing me something, I always try to pay attention to my surroundings: the trees, the weather, and the warmth outside, how it feels, you know, how I would have assumed it to feel, where the sun is at, everything. I try to pay attention because you can always tell where we are in the season. The sun was setting more towards the southwest, so it was a summer month, probably late summer. So, this was basically the end of it, but it was a warning of an EMP attack upon our nation. I know it's a heavy message, but I want to tell you about things that the Lord shows me to pray about. It's not to stir up fear; I believe we can stop things through intercessory prayer. I tell people this stuff to warn you to pray. Thank you so much for watching this video. Hopefully, it didn't freak you out too bad. Have a blessed day, everybody.]
